---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an operator, function, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to model or query? What's missing today?

## Proposed solution

The operator, function, or API you'd like. If it maps to a PostgreSQL `ltree`
operator/function, name it (see [`docs/ltree/postgresql-ltree-reference.md`](../../docs/ltree/postgresql-ltree-reference.md)).

```typescript
// sketch of the desired API, if you have one
```

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you've tried (e.g., raw SQL) and why they fall short.

## Additional context

Links to the relevant PostgreSQL docs, prior art, or the feature-support matrix
(`docs/feature-support.md`).
